Activity H (HVAC rough) takes 3 days (days 21 to 24), leaving 2 days of float before the Rough inspection (Activity I) starts on day 26. A 1-day delay to Activity H increases its duration to 4 days, which is fully absorbed by its float and does not delay the project finish.",
